name: BG Container Glass Public Company Limited
summary: BG Container Glass Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes glass packaging containers and bottles in Thailand and internationally. The company also generates and distributes electricity from solar power, as well as imports various types of bottles for selling to its customers. It serves customers in various industries, such as beer bottles, non-alcoholic beverage bottles, food, pesticide and medicine, energy drink, liquor, flavoured liquor, and others. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Thanyaburi, Thailand. BG Container Glass Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Bangkok Glass Public Company Limited.
